title: Fix mkdirSync static import and verify gates
description: Confirm mkdirSync is statically imported from "fs" at top of src/store/graph.ts, save() has no await, then run npm run build, npm test, and npm run lint to verify all gates pass. Update CLAUDE.md known-issues entry once gates are green.

plan.objective: Verify that the mkdirSync static import fix in src/store/graph.ts is correctly implemented and that all gate commands pass
key_changes: Verified src/store/graph.ts has correct static import: mkdirSync in top-level import from 'fs'
Confirmed save() function is synchronous with no await keyword
Verified mkdirSync is called before writeFileSync in save() function
All three gate commands pass: npm run build, npm test, npm run lint (src/)
Regression guard test confirms mkdirSync called before writeFileSync
No CLAUDE.md changes needed - no known issue entry exists for CART-B01
